seoTitle: Newlyn vs Newlyn North — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Newlyn and Newlyn North. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Newlyn vs Newlyn North: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Newlyn and Newlyn North.
heading: Newlyn vs Newlyn North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Newlyn, Victoria and Newlyn North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Newlyn North has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Newlyn (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Newlyn or Newlyn North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Newlyn has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Newlyn North scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Newlyn scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Newlyn North scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Newlyn or Newlyn North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Newlyn North has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
